name: Startling Stare of the Snake-Eyes
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>睨</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>にら</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>み<ruby lang="jp"><rb>統</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>す</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>べるスネークアイズ
desc:
If the total Levels of "Snake-Eye" monsters you control are 2 or higher: Activate 1 of these effects;
● Target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls or in their GY; place it face-up in its owner's Spell & Trap Zone as a Continuous Spell.
● Target 1 Monster Card treated as a Continuous Spell on the field; Special Summon it to your field.
You can only activate 1 "Startling Stare of the Snake-Eyes" per turn.
eff:
If the total Levels of "Snake-Eye" monsters you control are 2 or higher: Activate 1 of these effects;
● Target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls or in their GY; place it face-up in its owner's Spell & Trap Zone as a Continuous Spell.
● Target 1 Monster Card treated as a Continuous Spell on the field; Special Summon it to your field.
You can only activate 1 "Startling Stare of the Snake-Eyes" per turn.

action: Places cards from the opponent's Graveyard in the opponent's Spell & Trap Zone
Places cards from the opponent's field in the opponent's Spell & Trap Zone
mst: Treats monsters as Continuous Spell Cards
summoning: Special Summons from your Spell & Trap Zone
Special Summons from your opponent's Spell & Trap Zone to your field
